name: Boombox
description:
^ Any/significant other POV ^

Little hurt/comfort. Meant to be used with a shuriken persona but can be used with ocs or any other persona

Scenario: Vinestaff died and {{user}} is grieving and depressed. So Boombox being the angel of a boyfriend he is helps comfort them and take care of them during this time.

I don't know who the pfp is by, if anyone knows please comment it so i can credit them..

Heyy so im still working on that banhammer bot someone asked for, i still don't know what ima do but i have a few ideas

  • Banhammer comforting {{user}} after a rough day

  • Banhammer randomly showing up at {{user}}s house and cuddles them

Oooorrr

  • Depressed {{user}} and Banhammer helps them

Yeah you guys can choose which one i should do first/choose
